zh.lifeSummary: Joan Binweston於1333年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾麗頓。她於大約1354年與John Corbet II在英國英格蘭史洛普爾麗頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年6月20日在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾麗頓享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾哈爾。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Joan Binweston was born in 1333, in Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. She married John Corbet II about 1354, in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 June 1417, in Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 84, and was buried in Harley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1417, à Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Harley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Binwestonは1333年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアレイトンで生まれた。約1354年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアレイトンでJohn Corbet IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年6月20日にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアレイトンで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアハーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Binweston(은)는 1333년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 레이턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 레이턴에서 John Corbet II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 6월 20일 웨일스 몽고머이실르 레이턴에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 하를리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Binweston nasceu em 1333, em Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com John Corbet II aproximadamente 1354, em Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Joan Binweston родилась в 1333 г. в местности лиитон, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Corbet II около 1354 г. в местности лиитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 июня 1417 г. в местности лиитон, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности харли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
